programme.title: Mythbusters: There's Your Problem
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered whether the box or the cereal has more nutritional value? Does toast always land buttered side down? And can you really fry shrimp on the fly?

programme.title: Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: As the team chases the trajectory of the stone pathway in the swamp, they discover pieces of an English cannon dating back to nearly a century before the Money Pit.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: Chathams Challenge: Farming on the Chatham Islands isn’t for the faint-hearted.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: Fruitful Family: a Motueka family spreads its risk across three crops – apples, grapes and kiwifruit.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: Trucking disaster strikes on a country road when a 44-tonne truck, loaded with frozen chips, careers into a ditch and ends up resting dangerously on its side.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Season Premiere: A California almond farm serves up a hidden stash of retro surf shop relics, and a Prohibition Era bowling alley in L.A. offers a mind-blowing trip back in time.

programme.title: The Office U.S
programme.desc: Dwight, Andy and Angela tend to unfinished business.

programme.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programme.desc: Jessica is happy to learn of Evan's interest in joining the debate team; Eddie and Emery team up to enter a comic book contest.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Simpsons are all forced to face various Thanksgiving nightmares!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Todd, Todd, Why Hast Thou Forsaken Me?
programme.desc: When Todd blames God for the death of his mother and rejects his faith, Ned sends him to live with the Simpsons in an attempt to scare him back to God.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Andy Zaltzman dirties poor Alex Horne’s trousers and Emma Sidi reveals a startling belief regarding socks.

programme.title: Movie: Norbit
programme.desc: In this crazy comedy, a mild-mannered man (Eddie Murphy), who is married to a monstrous woman (also Eddie Murphy!), meets the woman of his dreams, and schemes to find a way to be with her..

programme.title: Twisted Metal
programme.desc: As the tournament kicks off, John and Quiet battle through a grueling qualifying round.

programme.title: Twisted Metal
programme.desc: John and Quiet forge new alliances and rivalries; Sweet Tooth crosses paths with a familiar foe.

programme.title: Duke - Back In The Future
programme.desc: We'll catch you later on DUKE.

programme.title: On Duke Today...
programme.desc: Here's what's on DUKE today.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Simpsons are all forced to face various Thanksgiving nightmares!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Todd, Todd, Why Hast Thou Forsaken Me?
programme.desc: When Todd blames God for the death of his mother and rejects his faith, Ned sends him to live with the Simpsons in an attempt to scare him back to God.

programme.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programme.desc: Jessica worries she can't compete with a top realtor and puts off taking the exam for her license; Eddie asks Louis for advice about winning over an older girl.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Season Premiere: A California almond farm serves up a hidden stash of retro surf shop relics, and a Prohibition Era bowling alley in L.A. offers a mind-blowing trip back in time.

programme.title: Alone
programme.sub-title: A Day In The Life: Kelsey
programme.desc: Ten new participants must survive in the Great Karoo desert as they face extreme temperatures, new species of predators and a host of exhausting challenges.

programme.title: Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: With cold weather approaching and time running out, another discovery in the swamp stuns the fellowship.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: Rawhide: Farmers become weekend cowboys as their cutting horses hit the arena.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: A young couple start a biodynamic winery from scratch.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: A truck careens off on the A1 and crash lands on top of live electrical components with a gas pipe dangerously close by. A lorry is precarious on soft ground.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Robbie visit an old-school general store filled with country road gold; a serious collector opens the doors to his empire of vintage coin-op scales.

programme.title: The Office U.S
programme.desc: Following Ryan's recent scandal at corporate, Holly must hold a business ethics seminar. Meanwhile, Jim makes Dwight comply with the company's "time theft" policy.

programme.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programme.desc: Eddie looks forward to starting high school with his friends; Jessica considers moving the family to a new neighbourhood; Louis gets the opportunity to expand Cattleman's Ranch.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Sideshow Bob gets contracted as the mall Santa; someone steals all the Christmas packages off people's front porches.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge attend Artie Ziff's wedding and become quite uncomfortable when they realise that his bride-to-be is a clone of Marge.

programme.title: Movie: Battleship
programme.desc: An international fleet of ships encounter an alien armada and discover their destructive goals. Starring Alexander Skarsgard and Rihanna..

programme.title: Outrageous Fortune
programme.desc: The Wests take sides as Judd faces trial, and Pascalle fears for the honour of her bridesmaid.

programme.title: Head High
programme.desc: An unexpected visitor throws the O’Kane whanau into turmoil; Tai is tempted to go to the dark side; Aria confides in the wrong person.

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman
programme.desc: A German American pilot, Dieter Dengler, uses survival skills honed as a child to escape a secret prison in Laos during the early years of the Vietnam war.

programme.title: Duke - Back In The Future
programme.desc: We'll catch you later on DUKE.

programme.title: On Duke Today...
programme.desc: Here's what's on DUKE today.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Sideshow Bob gets contracted as the mall Santa; someone steals all the Christmas packages off people's front porches.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge attend Artie Ziff's wedding and become quite uncomfortable when they realise that his bride-to-be is a clone of Marge.

programme.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programme.desc: Jessica's college boyfriend, Oscar Chow, comes to visit. She's a bit miffed that Louis isn't a little more jealous but she's got a blind spot and is oblivious to the fact that Oscar is gay.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Robbie visit an old-school general store filled with country road gold; a serious collector opens the doors to his empire of vintage coin-op scales.

programme.title: Alone
programme.sub-title: A Day In The Life Dug
programme.desc: Ten new participants must survive in the Great Karoo desert as they face extreme temperatures, new species of predators and a host of exhausting challenges.

programme.title: Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: Evidence of a continuous burn event in the swamp energizes the team, supporting the theory that a ship was burned and buried there centuries ago.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: Forest Giants: A Taranaki couple fell giant rimu trees in privately-owned bush.
